problem_statement.fact: All source-pool repair rows require backend expansion under the fixed repair analyzer. Four rows are no-valid after evaluation-only label join, and the one valid row is not action-time separable from the no-valid rows under the current pool evidence.
problem_statement.agent_inference: The next branch should expand or regenerate the non-GT candidate pool before goal-validity confirmation. Direct pass-through to goal-validity confirmation would mix no-valid pool failures with repeated-instance goal-validity reasoning.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This contract tests candidate-pool expansion evidence only. It must not be promoted as terminal ObjectNav utility.

allowed_action_inputs: source-pool repair action rows with repair_action == request_backend_pool_expansion
source_pool_proxy, action_candidate_summary, pool_accounting, repair_signals, and non-GT score/support features
existing non-GT semantic map candidates and backend candidate artifacts generated before evaluation label join
new non-GT backend candidates generated from fixed retrieval, spatial NMS, component, or dense map settings
candidate ids, semantic rank, semantic score, support score, grounded_position, visit_position, and reachability fields
Habitat navmesh, standoff feasibility, duplicate/spatial-diversity metadata, and projection feasibility generated without target labels
detector/SAM2 or local-context evidence only if generated after expansion from fixed action-time candidate ids
forbidden_action_inputs: choosing backend settings after inspecting per-row evaluation correctness

backend_expansion_objective.required_question: Can a fixed non-GT backend expansion produce an action-time candidate pool that is candidate-accountable, reachable enough to evaluate, and safe to hand to goal-validity confirmation?

route_actions.condition: The contract has not yet materialized an expanded candidate pool for a row, or the required backend artifacts are unavailable.
A fixed non-GT expanded pool has at least one reachable or standoff-feasible candidate with independent support and no action-time pool contradiction.
Expansion evidence remains unavailable, contradictory, duplicate-only, unreachable, or insufficient for goal-validity confirmation.

candidate_generation_policy.long_running_job_policy: If dense re-export or preprocessing is needed, launch it as a background job under the AGENTS.md long-running task policy and record command, output, expected files, and verification command.

candidate_pool_accounting: report original candidate ids and expanded candidate ids
report new, retained, removed, duplicated, unreachable, and standoff-infeasible candidate counts
report whether source-top, detector-strong, local-context, and previous action candidates remain in the expanded pool
report candidate budget, backend family, expansion config, and deterministic sort key
independent_support: report detector/SAM2, projection, or local-context evidence if used after expansion
do not treat category visibility alone as candidate-pool validity
failure_accounting: report expanded pool still no-candidate or duplicate-only
report expanded pool unreachable or standoff-infeasible
report local-context pool contradiction not repaired
report source-top visibility still not goal validity

expected_next_analyzer.name: expanded_retrieval_backend_pool_expansion_v1
expected_next_analyzer.role: process backend expansion rows and decide whether each expanded pool still needs candidate generation, can proceed to goal-validity confirmation, or should remain deferred
expected_next_analyzer.input_scope: five rows from h001_expanded_retrieval_source_pool_repair_v1 with repair_action == request_backend_pool_expansion

promotion_rules.contract_only: Passing this contract permits backend pool expansion implementation, not a paper utility claim.
promotion_rules.goal_validity_confirmation_unblocked: Goal-validity confirmation can be defined only for rows whose backend expansion evidence routes to goal-validity confirmation after expansion.
promotion_rules.paper_claim_blocked: No policy-scale or terminal ObjectNav claim is allowed until backend expansion and goal-validity confirmation pass on a predeclared source.

next_steps: Implement backend pool expansion analyzer from this contract.
Run Docker py_compile or equivalent smoke check.
Run the analyzer on the five frozen request_backend_pool_expansion rows.
If a long-running dense backend job is needed, launch it with logs and status under the AGENTS.md background-task policy.
Define goal-validity confirmation evidence only for rows routed to goal-validity confirmation after expansion.
